label: 第136話
source_locator: 単行本16巻 目次 p.47
summary_short: 九十九と夏油の肉体を操る術師は、人類と呪力の未来をめぐって対立する。術師は遠隔で無為転変を発動し、全国に覚醒者と受肉者を生み出して死滅回游を始動させる。
summary_full: 九十九由基は呪力からの脱却、羂索は呪力の最適化を人類の次段階として掲げ、互いの構想を論じる。羂索は真人から抽出した無為転変を遠隔発動し、呪物を取り込ませた器には受肉への適性を、術式を持つ非術師には術式を使える脳を与える。伏黒津美紀を含む多数が覚醒し、互いに戦わせる計画が始動する。裏梅は脹相の血の毒で動けなくなり、羂索は千年前の術師との縛りや呪物を説明した後、獄門疆を持って大量の呪霊とともに退却し、呪術全盛の時代の再来を宣言する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: As the 渋谷事変 finally comes to an end, Pseudo-夏油 and 九十九由基 disagree on the role 呪力 will play in the evolution of humanity. Pseudo-夏油 explains his plans for the world of the future, a return to an era that reflects the Heian and the height of cursed techniques .
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: " The next stage of humanity lies in breaking away from 呪力. " 由基 asks "夏油" if he remembers their conversation eleven years ago. They both wanted to create a world where 呪霊 could no longer exist. Regardless of the method, 由基 knows that humans will advance to their next stage. She believes that stage lies in breaking away from 呪力. Pseudo-夏油 argues that it can only come from optimizing 呪力. Partially frozen and entirely confused, 悠仁 mentions that he doesn't understand either method and wonders who 由基 even is. 夏油 states he thought 由基 abandoned her method when 禪院甚爾 died. 由基 argues Pseudo-夏油's method has a large hole because only the humans of Japan can be enhanced through 天元 and optimizing 呪力. A monopoly on 呪力 in Japan could cause other world superpowers to react. The chaos that would result in is far removed from the world 由基 and 夏油 spoke of. " No. It lies in optimizing 呪力. " Pseudo-夏油 laughs and reveals that his objective is completely different from hers. He sees sorcerers , non-sorcerers, and 呪霊 as all possible forms of 呪力 in the image of human beings. He also believes there must be more to human potential. During his time as 加茂憲紀 , he created the 呪胎九相図 Wombs to try and bring about that potential. However, Pseudo-夏油 does not believe his creations will ever exceed the bounds of his own potential. The only way the mad sorcerer can achieve his goal is by unleashing chaos he cannot control. Having already extracted 真人 's innate technique, Pseudo-夏油 prepares to activate it. 由基 quickly realizes what the 呪詛師 might be trying to do and asks 悠仁 what happened to the soul-manipulating 呪霊. 悠仁 reveals that Pseudo-夏油 absorbed 真人, much to 由基's dismay. Pseudo-夏油 slams his palm on the ground, creating a giant seal marking on the ground. This initiates a remote activation of a 術式, surprising 悠仁, Pseudo-夏油 activates 無為転変 to manipulate the soul's of people he's marked. Pseudo-夏油 thanks 悠仁 for helping 真人 reach his potential before he was absorbed via 呪霊操術 . Any technique acquired this way stops improving the moment its original user is absorbed. 夏油 adds that he also wanted to get 漏瑚's abilities as well.由基 asks what he's done and the 呪詛師 reveals he's used 無為転変 on two different types of people who have already been marked with the same seal he just cast. 伏黒津美紀 is one of those people, and she has finally awoken in her hospital room. The first type of non-sorcerers marked are vessels 夏油 had ingest cursed objects similar to how 悠仁 incarnated 宿儺 . The second type are those whose brains were meant to be non-sorcerers like 吉野順平 . 無為転変 allowed Pseudo-夏油 to adjust their brains for the capacity to use jujutsu and develop innate techniques. To those who've ingested cursed objects, 夏油 gave them the strength to be proper vessels. As one of the people marked, 津美紀 finally awakens. Although some have been in deep slumber since being marked by Pseudo-夏油's 呪力, they will awaken soon and fight each other to deepen their understanding of 呪力. He carefully chose those who will participate in the chaos and compares it to releasing a thousand evil Yujis. 由基 doesn't believe a thousand people will be enough to get humans to kill each other. Pseudo-夏油 ensures her he would not make such an oversight, annoying 由基. She asks 悠仁 to help beat the 呪詛師 up but the 呪術高専 student is still frozen in place from 裏梅 's attack. Suddenly, the ice melts around 悠仁 and everyone else who was frozen, freeing them. Pseudo-夏油 asks 裏梅 what's wrong and they come to the conclusion they've been poisoned. 脹相 reveals that his blood poisoned them when 穿血 connected with 裏梅's guard. 西宮桃 suggests there may be more enemies since 禪院真依 never came to back them up after firing her sniper shot. 由基 reveals that she's been buying time for ラルゥ to move in position to protect 真依, 東堂葵 , and 新田新 . パンダ is able to move and asks Noritoshi if he's alright as well. The Kyoto student assures パンダ that regulating his body temperature is no issue. In contrast 日下部篤也 remains on the ground discouraged from the long day's events. Pseudo-夏油 escapes with 獄門疆 and declares the future will reflect the 平安の世. Having heard enough interruptions, Pseudo-夏油 declares he is still talking. The cursed objects he provided were created from sorcerers he made vows with a millennia ago. However, those vows became null when he obtained 夏油傑 's body. 由基 understands the implications of this just as Pseudo-夏油 announces that this is the world of the future. Several 呪霊 abruptly appear from the curse manipulator as he shows 獄門疆 to 悠仁. 悠仁 calls out his sensei's name as the 呪詛師 says he expects a lot of the 呪術高専 student. As Pseudo-夏油 disappears into the darkness and makes his exit, he asks 宿儺 if he's listening. He declares that the golden age of jujutsu is returning and the world similar to that of the 平安時代 is preparing to begin once again.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 虎杖悠仁 九十九由基 Pseudo-夏油 裏梅 禪院甚爾 (言及のみ) ミゲル (想像) 脹相 真人 (回想) 伏黒津美紀 西宮桃 加茂憲紀 パンダ 日下部篤也 宿儺 (言及のみ)
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 渋谷 渋谷警察署跡 渋谷警察署跡
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 脹相の術式 赤血操術 (言及のみ) 穿血 (言及のみ) 穿血 (言及のみ) 呪物 獄門疆 パンダの術式 ゴリラモード Pseudo-夏油の術式 呪霊操術

key_events_verified_phase7: 九十九と羂索が人類と呪力の進化について対立する
羂索が無為転変を遠隔発動する
伏黒津美紀ら覚醒型・受肉型の術師が起動する
裏梅が脹相の血の毒で行動不能になる
羂索が獄門疆を持って退却する
死滅回游へつながる計画が始動する
verification_notes_phase7: 集英社公式14～16巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第七段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
